title: Sort Columns individual in Kanban view

posts.author: Marcel11 (Marcel Walter)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are working as a small team of graphic designers and we use almost exclusively the Kanban view. We separate the columns by status and sort them via due date ascending, so that everything urgent is at the top.
We would like to reverse this sorting or disable it for the “Done” status, because we would like to see the most recent finished tasks on top. Right now there is always an old task on top, and the most recently finished are hidden all the way at the bottom of the column.

posts.author: DylanDowns (Dylan Downs)
posts.cookedHtml: You can create a separate kanban view on the same board, and use that just for viewing your ‘done’ items.
